title: Rate my P/L and risk management?
author: Kind_Shop_3846

comments.author: Pramlyn
comments.body: How do you do it? I am pure loss after loss!

replies.author: Kind_Shop_3846
replies.body:
What’s been useful for me is building a simple stack that covers different parts of trading.

For charting and structure, I stick with [TradingView](https://www.tradingview.com). It’s clean, easy to use, and the alerts keep me from staring at charts all day.

To actually spot trade ideas, I use [Stock Sight App](https://apps.apple.com/pt/app/stock-sight-screener-chart/id6748093837). It scans the market in real time, flags unusual momentum/volume, and even explains potential buy/sell setups in plain language, that’s been super helpful for filtering out the noise.

When it comes to understanding where big money is sitting, order flow tools are a must. [Exocharts](https://exocharts.com) is great for footprint charts, and [Bookmap](https://bookmap.com/en) makes it easy to see liquidity walls and track large buyers/sellers.

And if you like trading news-driven moves, [Benzinga Pro](https://www.benzinga.com/recent) is fast for headlines.

That combo gives me structure, flow, and context without overcomplicating things.
